video:video.video:title: Aerial Drone Tour — 2140 192nd Ave SE, Sammamish, WA
video:video.video:description: Aerial drone tour of a custom luxury modern home for sale in Sammamish, WA — 5 bed + office, 3 bath, 3,297 sq ft on a 0.56-acre lot near Lake Sammamish.
